name: The Hook-Pole Raider
setup: A scavenger-raider with a hooked salvage pole has decided your pack is worth more than your goodwill. The interference shimmer makes distance hard to judge — this will be close work.

opponent.name: Vess, hook-pole raider
opponent.notes: Fights to rob, not to kill. Yields when badly hurt; accepts a yield gracefully — the Zone has its own code.

stakes: Loss means waking bruised with your pack lighter. Victory or a clean flee keeps everything — and Vess remembers either way.
